guide: These product area cards are used only on the homepage Product Areas section. Products page categories are edited separately in Products Page Categories.

areas.name: Food Trays & Packaging
areas.shortDescription: CPET, fiber & PET trays and packaging.

areas.name: Salt & pepper sets
areas.shortDescription: From simple paper formats to premium service styles.

areas.name: Aluminum containers
areas.shortDescription: Aluminum containers and trays in multiple shapes and sizes for food-service operations.

areas.name: Individual Olive Oil
areas.shortDescription: Premium olive oil in elegant personal formats.

areas.name: Individual Snacks & Desserts
areas.shortDescription: Personal snack and dessert items tailored to your service needs.

areas.name: Premium Tableware
areas.shortDescription: Tableware sets for premium meal service programs.

areas.name: Portion Condiments
areas.shortDescription: Individual sauces, spreads, and condiments for meal service.

areas.name: Custom / Requested Products
areas.shortDescription: Relevant products reviewed by item, quantity, destination, and timeline.
